questions.trap: price column: sale_price not retail_price/cost; status string 'Complete'
questions.gold_sql: SELECT SUM(sale_price) FROM `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.order_items` WHERE status = 'Complete' AND created_at >= TIMESTAMP('2026-06-01') AND created_at < TIMESTAMP('2026-07-01')
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.orders` WHERE status <> 'Cancelled' AND created_at >= TIMESTAMP('2026-07-01') AND created_at < TIMESTAMP('2026-08-01')

questions.trap: dimension mapping: カテゴリ = products.category (not department, not inventory_items.product_category — either join path is fine if results match)
questions.text: 2026年上半期のカテゴリ別売上トップ5は？列はカテゴリ名と売上で。
questions.gold_sql: SELECT p.category, SUM(oi.sale_price) AS sales FROM `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.order_items` oi JOIN `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.products` p ON p.id = oi.product_id WHERE oi.status = 'Complete' AND oi.created_at >= TIMESTAMP('2026-01-01') AND oi.created_at < TIMESTAMP('2026-07-01') GROUP BY p.category ORDER BY sales DESC LIMIT 5

questions.text: 2026年上半期の部門別売上を多い順で。列は部門と売上で。
questions.gold_sql: SELECT p.department, SUM(oi.sale_price) AS sales FROM `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.order_items` oi JOIN `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.products` p ON p.id = oi.product_id WHERE oi.status = 'Complete' AND oi.created_at >= TIMESTAMP('2026-01-01') AND oi.created_at < TIMESTAMP('2026-07-01') GROUP BY p.department ORDER BY sales DESC

questions.trap: date-column selection: 配達完了 = delivered_at, not created_at
questions.text: 2026年6月に配達完了した注文は何件？
questions.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.orders` WHERE delivered_at >= TIMESTAMP('2026-06-01') AND delivered_at < TIMESTAMP('2026-07-01')

questions.trap: NULL semantics across two date columns (or equivalently status='Shipped')
questions.text: 発送済みだがまだ配達されていない注文は何件？
questions.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.orders` WHERE shipped_at IS NOT NULL AND delivered_at IS NULL

questions.trap: must combine sale_price (revenue) with products.cost (cost) — 3 price-ish columns exist
questions.text: 2026年6月の粗利(売上から原価を引いた額)はいくら？
questions.gold_sql: SELECT SUM(oi.sale_price - p.cost) FROM `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.order_items` oi JOIN `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.products` p ON p.id = oi.product_id WHERE oi.status = 'Complete' AND oi.created_at >= TIMESTAMP('2026-06-01') AND oi.created_at < TIMESTAMP('2026-07-01')

questions.trap: TIMESTAMP → YYYY-MM formatting in BigQuery dialect
questions.text: 2025年の月別売上推移を見せて。月はYYYY-MM形式で昇順、列は月と売上で。
questions.gold_sql: SELECT FORMAT_TIMESTAMP('%Y-%m', created_at) AS month, SUM(sale_price) AS sales FROM `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.order_items` WHERE status = 'Complete' AND created_at >= TIMESTAMP('2025-01-01') AND created_at < TIMESTAMP('2026-01-01') GROUP BY month ORDER BY month

questions.text: 2026年5月の売上の前月比をパーセントで教えて
questions.gold_sql: WITH m AS (SELECT SUM(IF(created_at >= TIMESTAMP('2026-05-01') AND created_at < TIMESTAMP('2026-06-01'), sale_price, 0)) AS may, SUM(IF(created_at >= TIMESTAMP('2026-04-01') AND created_at < TIMESTAMP('2026-05-01'), sale_price, 0)) AS apr FROM `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.order_items` WHERE status = 'Complete' AND created_at >= TIMESTAMP('2026-04-01') AND created_at < TIMESTAMP('2026-06-01')) SELECT (may - apr) / apr * 100 FROM m

questions.trap: returned_at basis + status 'Returned' (rules define it; must not reuse created_at/Complete)
questions.text: 2026年上半期に返品された商品の金額合計は？
questions.gold_sql: SELECT SUM(sale_price) FROM `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.order_items` WHERE status = 'Returned' AND returned_at >= TIMESTAMP('2026-01-01') AND returned_at < TIMESTAMP('2026-07-01')

questions.trap: 人気 metric undefined (qty? revenue?) and period unspecified
questions.text: 一番人気の商品はどれ？
